formula_note: Direct carry-through of the artillery entry's lower-bound statement that at least 25,000 civilians were killed.
uncertainty_note: Lower bound only. This should not be treated as a complete upper-bounded artillery death estimate.
quality_note: Strong floor for direct civilian deaths from artillery bombardment.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the single-day lower-bound statement that more than 1,000 people were killed in the 19 September raid.
uncertainty_note: Lower bound only; the raid is nested within the broader bombardment window and should not be summed with it without overlap adjustment.
